# Project Chimera — golden-checksum replay baseline (Story 1.2).
# Format: "<tick> <hashHex8>" per line — tick decimal, hash 8 uppercase hex digits (no 0x).
# checksum_algo_version: 3
# Pins today's SimChecksum sequence for GoldenScenario.Build() stepped via StepOnce at ChecksumInterval=1.
# Samples: 300 (one line per sim tick).
# Re-baseline (intentional behavior change only): set CHIMERA_GOLDEN_RECORD=1, run `dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~GoldenChecksumReplay`, then `dotnet build` (refreshes the embedded copy) and commit. DO NOT hand-edit.
